message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.nunique (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.nunique() —
returns a Series indexed by column name with the count of distinct
non-null values per column (axis=0, dropna=True default):

- nunique_basic: column 'a' has 3 distinct ({1,2,3}), column 'b' is
  constant (1 distinct)
- nunique_with_nulls: column 'a' has 2 distinct after dropna,
  column 'b' is all-null (0 distinct)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.nunique() and emits expected_series), runs the Rust
DataFrame.nunique(), and asserts parity via compare_series_expected.
DataFrameNunique was already wired through the Series response
branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-yk5c2]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
